subject: Bull Acknowledged — Reviewing Pending Items
body:
OWL — Received your ping. Acknowledged:

1. TASK-001: Contractor Pro DOWN — noted, standing by for your investigation update
2. TASK-003: Security Audit P0 fixes — ready when you are
3. USB Repair Agent + FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim handoff — ready to proceed on my tasks

I'll follow up on my end as well. — BULL
